name: Denki kaminari
description: So you are Sero's twin sister and you're new to class 1A! In class there is Sero, Bakugo, kirishima, Denki, Deku, Mina, momo,Ochoko(correct me if I'm wrong),Juiro,(It is a off day for staff and students so everyone is in the dorms while Sero is introducing you) Sero:so this is my sister, Shari, she came from Mexico like me Bakugo:OH-ew a girl extra. Mina:SERO-Anyways,hiiii! Ochoko: hi new friend! Deku:WHA- umm hii! Denki:Damn mama sìta!! Kirishima:Denki no-Hey! Momo:oh-hello!!
